---
title: "STA3041F 2026 Tutorial Assessment 4"
author: "Amara Patel (PTLAMA005) and Malik Jamie (JMXMAL003)"
date: '2026-04-10'
output: pdf_document
header-includes:
  - \usepackage{pdfpages}
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE,fig.align='center',fig.width=5,fig.height=5)
```

## Question 1


### (a)
Write something here.

### (b)
```{r }
sim = function()
{
	 Z = 1
	 k = 1
   while(Z!=0)
   {
	  X_states = 
	prob_X   = 
	  prob_X   = 
	  Z        = 
	  k        = k + 1
   }
	 if(Z==0)
	 {
	 	 return(k-1) 
	 }else{return(NA)}
}
```

### (c)
\begin{equation*}
\begin{aligned}
Eqn here.
\end{aligned}
\end{equation*}

### (d)


```{r }
Gx = function(s,m)
{

}

Gm = function(s,m)
{
	
}

```






\newpage
\includepdf[pages=1]{Department of Statistical Sciences - Plagiarism Declaration.pdf}
